mapper.select: select q.*, pq.score as questionScore, pq.question_order as questionOrder from `question` q inner join `exam_paper_question` pq on q.id = pq.question_id where pq.paper_id = #{paperId} order by pq.question_order
mapper.insert:
insert into `question`
id, category_id, type, content, options, answer, analysis, images, difficulty, score, created_by, status,
#{id}, #{categoryId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{options, typeHandler=com.example.common.handler.JsonTypeHandler}, #{answer}, #{analysis}, #{images, typeHandler=com.example.common.handler.JsonListTypeHandler}, #{difficulty}, #{score}, #{createdBy}, #{status},
mapper.update:
update `question`
category_id = #{categoryId},
type = #{type},
content = #{content},
options = #{options, typeHandler=com.example.common.handler.JsonTypeHandler},
answer = #{answer},
analysis = #{analysis},
images = #{images, typeHandler=com.example.common.handler.JsonListTypeHandler},
difficulty = #{difficulty},
score = #{score},
status = #{status},
where id = #{id}
